title: Aerial Destruction
description:
Aerial Destruction is a helicopter game set during battles between militaries and armed groups of bio-engineered mutants !

3 helicopters to play, easy to fly with cockpit and behind view, having their own armaments, tactics, gameplay and upgradable with credits points to achieve maximum destruction !

7 missions with objectives ranging from defending military outposts for as long as possible, destroying enemy convoys, storming enemy positions, supporting allied troops in assaulting enemy bases, etc...

15 achievements to unlock, with support of Steam trading cards and Steam cloud to keep all progress available on any computer. Also playable with Xbox-like gamepads and in Ultra HD (4K).
description_short: Take off your helicopter and unleash destruction on the armed groups of bio-engineered mutants through various missions and environments !
